title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.385 - Circuit No. 7, number of judges
text:
478.385.  Circuit No. 7, number of judges. — There shall be four circuit judges in the seventh judicial circuit consisting of the county of Clay.
(L. 1958 2d Ex. Sess. p. 165 § 1, A.L. 1965 p. 642, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
